title: Docs: Covering the Essentials
body:
I think this might be enough for now regarding docs. The project structure is pretty intuitive so I just want to give hints. If it gets more complex down the road we have a nice foundation to build upon (and also still enough flexibility to switch to another solution if needed, agile ftw).

Demo view is here: https://eb-podman-py.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

comments.body: Happy to help. Great that there's a project that combines systemd, podman and Python!
